timedeventqueue.usage: Usage: !teq [add / accept / reject / complete / list / clear / accepting / pause / resume / addtime]
timedeventqueue.tagadd.permission: Only moderators can submit queue items this way.
timedeventqueue.tagadd.usage: Unable to submit the queue item: expected user, positive seconds, and content.
timedeventqueue.tagadd.closed: @$1 The queue is not accepting submissions right now.
timedeventqueue.tagaddcurrency.usage: Unable to submit the queue item: expected currency, positive cost, user, positive seconds, and content.
timedeventqueue.tagaddcurrency.currency: The queue submission currency is unavailable.
timedeventqueue.tagaddcurrency.notenough: @$1 You need $2 to submit this queue item.
timedeventqueue.tagaddcurrency.closed: @$1 The queue is not accepting submissions. $2 refunded.
timedeventqueue.accept.fail: Nothing to accept (an item may already be active).
